PyTTI Portable v1.0.0-beta
==========================

REQUIREMENTS
  - Windows 10 or 11
  - NVIDIA GPU (GTX 10xx through RTX 40xx)
    Note: RTX 50xx (Blackwell) is NOT supported
  - Up-to-date NVIDIA drivers
  - Git  (https://git-scm.com)

FIRST TIME SETUP
  1. Double-click install.bat
  2. Wait ~30-60 minutes (downloads ~6GB of packages)
  3. When it says 'Installation complete', close the window

RUNNING
  Double-click launch.bat
  A browser window opens automatically

FIRST RENDER NOTE
  The first time you render, CLIP and depth models will
  download automatically (~1-4GB). Cached after that.

OUTPUT
  Frames are saved to: app\outputs\<date>\<time>\images_out\
